import io
import string

fn gcd(_ a: Int, _ b: Int) -> Int
  if b == 0
    a
  else
    gcd(b, a % b)
  end
end

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    return Err("no input")
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(line)
  let a_str = match parts.get(0)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    return Err("missing A")
  end
  let b_str = match parts.get(1)
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    return Err("missing B")
  end
  let a = match string.parse_int(a_str)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    return Err("invalid A")
  end
  let b = match string.parse_int(b_str)
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    return Err("invalid B")
  end
  let g = gcd(a, b)
  print("gcd=#{g}")
  Ok(())
end
